sentences.arabic: يُعَرَّفُ التَّوَكُّلُ عَلَى اللهِ بِأَنَّهُ صِدْقُ اعْتِمَادِ الْقَلْبِ عَلَى الرَّبِّ فِي اسْتِجْلَابِ الْمَصَالِحِ وَدَفْعِ الْمَضَارِّ، مَعَ الثِّقَةِ التَّامَّةِ بِكِفَايَتِهِ سُبْحَانَهُ.
sentences.translation: Tevekkuk (oslanjanje na Allaha) definiše se kao iskreno oslanjanje srca na Gospodara u postizanju koristi i otklanjanju šteta, uz potpuno povjerenje u Njegovu dostatnost, neka je slavljen On.
sentences.translationEn: Tawakkul (reliance on Allah) is defined as the heart's sincere reliance on the Lord in attaining benefits and warding off harms, with complete trust in His sufficiency, Glorified be He.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ وَضَّحَ النَّبِيُّ -صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ- هَذَا الْمَفْهُومَ بِقَوْلِهِ: «لَوْ أَنَّكُمْ تَوَكَّلْتُمْ عَلَى اللهِ حَقَّ تَوَكُّلِهِ لَرَزَقَكُمْ كَمَا يَرْزُقُ الطَّيْرَ، تَغْدُو خِمَاصًا وَتَرُوحُ بِطَانًا» [رَوَاهُ التِّرْمِذِيُّ وَصَحَّحَهُ الْأَلْبَانِيُّ فِي صَحِيحِ الْجَامِعِ، رَقْمُ 5253].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, s.a.v.s., je pojasnio ovaj koncept rekavši: 'Kada biste se vi na Allaha oslanjali onako kako se treba oslanjati, On bi vas opskrbljivao kao što opskrbljuje ptice; odlaze ujutro gladne, a vraćaju se navečer site' [Bilježi Tirmizi, a šejh Albani ga je ocijenio vjerodostojnim u Sahihul-Džami'u, br. 5253].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) clarified this concept by saying: 'If you were to rely upon Allah with the reliance He is due, He would provide for you just as He provides for the birds; they go out in the morning empty-stomached and return in the evening full' [Narrated by al-Tirmidhi and authenticated by al-Albani in Sahih al-Jami', No. 5253].

sentences.arabic: فَالطَّيْرُ لَا تَبْقَى فِي أَعْشَاشِهَا مُنْتَظِرَةً الرِّزْقَ، بَلْ تَسْعَى وَتَبْذُلُ السَّبَبَ، وَهَذَا هُوَ جَوْهَرُ التَّوَكُّلِ الصَّحِيحِ الَّذِي يَجْمَعُ بَيْنَ الْعَمَلِ وَالْيَقِينِ.
sentences.translation: Ptice ne ostaju u svojim gnijezdima čekajući opskrbu, već se trude i poduzimaju uzroke, a to je suština ispravnog tevekkula koji spaja rad i čvrsto uvjerenje.
sentences.translationEn: Birds do not stay in their nests waiting for provision, but rather they strive and take action, and this is the essence of correct Tawakkul which combines effort with certainty.

sentences.arabic: وَيَشْرَحُ الْإِمَامُ ابْنُ الْقَيِّمِ أَنَّ التَّوَكُّلَ نِصْفُ الدِّينِ، وَالنِّصْفُ الآخَرُ هُوَ الْإِنَابَةُ، حَيْثُ يَتَحَرَّرُ الْعَبْدُ مِنْ قُيُودِ الْخَوْفِ مِنَ الْمَخْلُوقِينَ وَيَلْجَأُ إِلَى الْخَالِقِ وَحْدَهُ.
sentences.translation: Imam Ibnul-Kajjim objašnjava da je tevekkul polovina vjere, dok je druga polovina inaba (povratak Allahu), jer se rob oslobađa okova straha od stvorenja i utječe se samo Stvoritelju.
sentences.translationEn: Imam Ibn al-Qayyim explains that Tawakkul is half of the religion, and the other half is Inabah (turning to Allah), whereby the servant is liberated from the shackles of fearing created beings and resorts to the Creator alone.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَحْقِيقَ التَّوَكُّلِ يَبُثُّ فِي الرُّوحِ قُوَّةً لَا تُقْهَرُ، وَيَجْعَلُ الْمُؤْمِنَ صَابِرًا عِنْدَ الشَّدَائِدِ، شَاكِرًا عِنْدَ الرَّخَاءِ، لِعِلْمِهِ أَنَّ مَقَادِيرَ الْأُمُورِ بِيَدِ اللهِ.
sentences.translation: Ostvarenje tevekkula ulijeva u dušu nepobjedivu snagu i čini vjernika strpljivim u nedaćama, a zahvalnim u blagostanju, jer zna da su odredbe svih stvari u Allahovoj ruci.
sentences.translationEn: Achieving Tawakkul instills an invincible strength in the soul and makes the believer patient during hardships and grateful during prosperity, knowing that the decrees of all matters are in Allah's hands.

sentences.arabic: وَبِهَذَا، يَتَحَوَّلُ التَّوَكُّلُ إِلَى مَنْهَجِ حَيَاةٍ يَقِي الْإِنْسَانَ مِنَ الْقَلَقِ النَّفْسِيِّ وَالِاضْطِرَابِ، مِمَّا يُؤَدِّي إِلَى الِاسْتِقْرَارِ الرُّوحِيِّ وَالْمَادِّيِّ.
sentences.translation: Na taj način, tevekkul se pretvara u životni pravac koji štiti čovjeka od psihičke tjeskobe i nemira, što vodi ka duhovnoj i materijalnoj stabilnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, Tawakkul turns into a way of life that protects man from psychological anxiety and turmoil, leading to spiritual and material stability.
